# llms.txt: Discovery Index for Cli Chunker

> Universal project packager for AI context delivery.

- [README.md](README.md): High-level mission and quickstart.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Strict execution rules and command shortcuts.
- [OPERATIONAL.md](OPERATIONAL.md): Deep-dive into versioning and registry logic.
- [SPECIFICATION.md](SPECIFICATION.md): Typed BEJSON 104db schema for project chunks.
